top_signals.title: Romania says Russian drone hit apartment block, NATO vows to defend alliance territory
top_signals.summary: “I affirmed that NATO stands ready to defend every inch of Allied territory,” NATO Secretary General Mark Rutte said on X.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: SpaceX Said to Cut IPO Value Goal to at Least $1.8 Trillion
top_signals.summary: SpaceX is currently targeting a valuation of at least $1.8 trillion in its initial public offering, according to people familiar with the matter, as Elon Musk’s rocket and artificial intelligence company nears its debut.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Dell stock skyrockets 32%, heads for best day ever as AI server revenue soars
top_signals.summary: Dell reported its fastest pace of revenue growth since returning to the public market in 2018, with AI server revenue soaring 757% over last year.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Vietnam's President says Asia Pacific seeks 'responsible commitment,' including from major powers
top_signals.summary: Asia-Pacific seeks neither the presence or absence of a major power, but instead "responsible commitment" from all parties, Lam said.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Trump DOJ 'lawfare' fund temporarily blocked by judge as suit proceeds
